== Notes for [[Item:Q83728|Q83728]] ==

From ''Banu Mahkzum'' Tribe.

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Umm_Kulthum_bint_Asim

https://books.google.com/books?id=2QKBUwBUWWkC&pg=PA367&lpg=PA367&dq=Na%27ila+uthman&source=bl&ots=eQIOrUZJgE&sig=jBYL-CxEfC0l4_PDQxHrfS6QjIE&hl=en&sa=X&ved=0ahUKEwjq4Pu1zbrbAhUR-58KHU_2AT0Q6AEIhwEwCQ#v=onepage&q=al-malik&f=false

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
671E314327B881EFBC189822EF79916C3BEB
geni:6000000014644017120

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
